available_skills.name: moveTo
available_skills.description: Move robot arm to a named pose (HOME, approach_bolts, place_bolts). Does NOT work with object names.

available_skills.name: grasp
available_skills.description: Complete grasp sequence for target object: opens gripper, moves to approach position, closes gripper, attaches object. Use this for picking up objects.
internal_sequence: Move arm to object's approach position
Attach object to gripper (if object.io.do_attach_after_approach is true)

available_skills.name: release
available_skills.description: Complete release sequence for grasped object: detaches object from gripper, opens gripper. Use this for placing objects.

available_skills.name: openGripper
available_skills.description: Manually open the gripper. Only use if you need gripper control independent of grasp/release.
available_skills.note: Usually not needed - grasp and release handle gripper automatically

available_skills.name: closeGripper
available_skills.description: Manually close the gripper. Only use if you need gripper control independent of grasp/release.
available_skills.note: Usually not needed - grasp and release handle gripper automatically

available_skills.name: inspect
available_skills.description: Move to the target object's approach pose for a visual check. Used for safety verification. NOTE: no camera/perception pipeline exists yet (see experiments/run_rq4_perception_noise.py) -- this only positions the arm, it does not actually evaluate what it sees.

available_skills.name: unscrew
available_skills.description: Scripted gripper-rotation sequence at the target's approach pose to simulate unscrewing. Requires gripper holding the bolt first. NOTE: no torque/force sensing exists, so this is a motion sequence, not a force-verified bolt removal.

available_skills.name: disconnect
available_skills.description: Grip-and-pull sequence to disconnect a connector. NOTE: no force feedback confirms the connector actually disengaged.

available_skills.name: waitForStabilization
available_skills.description: Wait for robot to stabilize after movement.

available_skills.name: rotateGripper
available_skills.description: Rotate gripper by angle in degrees.

_NOTE: available_poses/available_objects below MUST exactly match config/moveit/waypoints.json's 'poses'/'objects' keys -- this list is what gets fed into the LLM prompt as the ONLY valid targets (see planner.py:161-162). A name here with no matching waypoints.json entry produces a plan the LLM thinks is valid but the robot will reject (e.g. the previous list included BMSConnector/PowerConnector/TopCoverBolt_1..4/etc with no coordinates anywhere -- those all failed on the real robot with 'Unknown object'). Add a name here ONLY after adding its real coordinates to waypoints.json.

skill_usage_notes.for_picking_objects: Use grasp(ObjectName) - handles entire pick sequence
skill_usage_notes.for_placing_objects: Use release(ObjectName) - handles entire place sequence
skill_usage_notes.for_moving_to_poses: Use moveTo(PoseName) - only for named poses, NOT objects
skill_usage_notes.common_mistake: Do NOT use moveTo with object names like TopCoverBolts - use grasp/release instead
